channel.title: Clean Code on Silent Gopher
channel.description: Recent content in Clean Code on Silent Gopher

item.title: Functional Options in Go: The Pattern Behind Clean Service Constructors
item.description: 💡 If your function signature has grown to five parameters, the sixth one doesn’t make the code harder to read — it makes it dangerous.

item.title: Coupling and Cohesion in Software Architecture (with Go Examples)
item.description: When designing distributed or modular systems, understanding the relationship between coupling and cohesion is key to achieving a maintainable, flexible, and scalable architecture.
